needs.actor: equity research analyst covering enterprise SaaS at Morgan Stanley, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan, and Gartner
needs.job: rewrite the enterprise SaaS valuation model from seats-times-ARPU to share-of-API-calls-touched-by-agents inside Q2 2026
needs.outcome: published research note with the new valuation framework, named coverage list, downgraded targets for Workday / Atlassian / Box / Smartsheet-class names, and explicit Agent-native vs Legacy axis
needs.motivation: ServiceNow's worst-ever -18% drop with chained Salesforce / Workday / Oracle falls signals the displacement axis is now market-consensus; analysts late to the model lose institutional credibility

task.who: equity research analyst + sector strategist + data / quant team + editor / publishing + sales coverage
task.what: build the share-of-API-calls metric, run displacement scenarios, and publish the rewrite with downgraded targets
task.where: research platform + data vendors + corporate-access channel + institutional client distribution
task.why: ARPU-times-seats math no longer reflects how AI agents reroute SaaS revenue; the analyst who lags the model loses the institutional read
task.how: API-call telemetry vendors + customer interviews + scenario-DCF rebuild + downgrade publication + corporate-access tour

needs.motivation: post-ServiceNow drop, enterprise buyers need a vendor-comparison artifact aligned with the displacement narrative; the firm that publishes first sets the procurement template for the next two budget cycles

rationale: Prediction landed 2026-05-05 (huge_longshot_hit_at) on the May 5 Anthropic 10-agent finance launch (Citadel/BNY/Carlyle/Mizuho/Travelers/Walleye adopters; Moody's MCP credit ratings native into Claude) which displaced FactSet/Bloomberg/AML/KYC SaaS functions and confirmed the so_that consequence at VR=4. Per cross-stream rule (Bridge-cited deliverable -> Need.task.status flips to done), the equity research Need is marked done because the share-of-agent-API-calls reframe is now the de facto sell-side consensus framework. The Gartner/Forrester/IDC Need is in_progress (axis adopted on sell-side; analyst-house publication still pending). The SaaS CEO Need stays pending with a narrowed window (defensive-narrative now binding). Two new next-phase Needs added to capture the post-trigger actor coalition: buyside PMs + index issuers operationalizing the metric into rebalanced allocations, and PE/growth-equity GPs converting the -15%+ drops into take-private arbitrage.
